description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof, featuring a modern yet traditional urban design. The front facade includes a driveway with two parked cars, a gated entrance, and a small landscaped yard with a large tree. The house has multiple large windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house includes a covered carport, a fenced backyard, and additional greenery. The exterior walls are primarily red brick, complemented by white window frames and doors. The property is enclosed by a combination of brick and metal fencing, enhancing both security and privacy.
description: A two-story red brick house with a flat roof, gated driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement, set within a fenced urban lot with landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brick wall, upper story windows, driveway, and a car parked in the backyard with a large tree.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, two-car driveway, gated entry, and landscaped yard with a prominent tree.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the carport, fenced backyard, and additional greenery, with clear visibility of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backyard, carport, and secondary entrance, with visible fencing and garden elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small steps, and a gated driveway, flanked by large windows and minimal decorative elements.
